title: Kbd
description: A component that visually represents keyboard keys, used for shortcuts or instructions in documentation and tutorials.
summary: A stylized component that displays keyboard keys for user instructions or guides.

body.raw:
## Usage

Basic usage example to quickly see how the `Kbd` works.

<KbdDemosUsage />

## Properties

Interactive configurator to explore customization options for the `Kbd` component.

<KbdDemosConfigurator />

## API References

### Styles API

| Styles API  | Type      | Default | Annotation                                    |
| ----------- | --------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| unstyled`?` | `boolean` | `false` | if `true`, all default styles will be removed |

### Props API

| Props API | Type | Default | Annotation |
| --------- | ---- | ------- | ---------- |
| -`?`      | -    | `~`     | --         |

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup and styles.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the component immediately.

<SourceCodes name="kbd" />

  variants: {\r
    variant: {\r
      default: "font-mono leading-none font-bold border border-solid border-b-[.1875rem] border-muted bg-muted/60 text-color [unicode-bidi:embed]",\r
      primitive:\r
        "inline-flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 font-geist-mono font-normal align-text-top whitespace-nowrap select-none relative top-[-.03em] text-xs min-w-7 leading-7 box-border pb-[.05em] [word-spacing:-.1em] tracking-normal h-fit text-color bg-primitive [transition:transform,box-shadow_.12s,background-color_.12s] [box-shadow:inset_0_-0.05em_0.5em_hsl(var(--muted-foreground)/0.08),inset_0_0.05em_#f1f7feb5,inset_0_0.25em_0.5em_hsl(var(--muted-foreground)/0.17),inset_0_-0.1em_hsl(var(--background)/0.9),0_0_0_0.075em_hsl(var(--muted-foreground)/0.25),0_0.08em_0.17em_hsl(var(--background)/0.95)]"\r
    },\r
    size: {\r
      xs: "text-[.625rem] py-[0rem] px-[.25rem] rounded border-0 border-b-0",\r
      sm: "text-[.75rem] py-[.0625rem] px-[.3125rem] rounded-[.375rem]",\r
      md: "text-[.875rem] py-[.125rem] px-[.4375rem] rounded-[.5rem]",\r
      lg: "text-[1rem] py-[.1875rem] px-[.5625rem] rounded-[.625rem]",\r
      xl: "text-[1.25rem] py-[.25rem] px-[.875rem] rounded-[.625rem]"\r
    }\r
  }\r
});\r
\r
export const classesKbd = classes;\r
\r
export interface KbdProps extends React.PropsWithoutRef<Omit<React.ComponentProps<"kbd">, "style">>, cvxVariants<typeof classes> {\r
  unstyled?: boolean;\r
  style?: React.CSSProperties & Record<string, any>;\r
  items?: string[];\r
  separator?: React.ReactNode | ((index: number) => React.ReactNode);\r
}\r
\r
export const Kbd = React.forwardRef<HTMLElement, KbdProps>((_props, ref) => {\r
  const { children, unstyled, className, size = "sm", variant = "default", items, separator = "+", ...props } = _props;\r
  const rest = { ref, className: cn(!unstyled && classes({ size, variant }), className), ...props };\r
\r
  if (items) {\r
    return items.reduce<React.ReactNode[]>((acc, item, index) => {\r
      acc.push(\r
        <Kbd key={\`kbd-\${index}\`} {...rest}>\r
          {item}\r
        </Kbd>\r
      );\r
      if (index < items.length - 1) {\r
        const sparators = typeof separator === "function" ? separator?.(index) : separator;\r
        acc.push(<React.Fragment key={\`separator-\${index}\`}>{sparators}</React.Fragment>);\r
      }\r
      return acc;\r
    }, []);\r
  }\r
  return <kbd {...rest}>{children}</kbd>;\r
});\r
Kbd.displayName = "Kbd";\r
\r
/**\r
 * Memisahkan string menjadi items dan separators berdasarkan ekspresi reguler.\r
 *\r
 * @param kbd String yang akan diproses (contoh: "alt+mod+shift+X").\r
 * @param regexp Ekspresi reguler untuk memisahkan items dan separators (default: /[^+\\/\\|,]+|[+\\/\\|,]/g).\r
 * @returns Tuple berisi array items dan separators.\r
 */\r
export function kbdMatcher(kbd: string, regexp: string | RegExp = /[^+\\/\\|,]+|[+\\/\\|,]/g): readonly [string[], string[]] {\r
  const input = kbd.match(regexp) || [];\r
  const items = input.filter((_, index) => index % 2 === 0);\r
  const separators = input.filter((_, index) => index % 2 !== 0);\r
  return [items, separators] as const;\r
